use_cases: Displaying team members on company about pages
Showcasing employee profiles on SaaS landing pages
Building team sections for agency portfolios
Creating staff directories for organizational websites
ai_summary: Editorial-style team member card featuring overlapping portrait layers, large display typography with tracked uppercase labels, circular CTA button with arrow icon, and smooth Framer Motion entrance animations. Designed for showcasing individual team members on company websites with left/right positioning flexibility and customizable content props.
